sourceTitle: Central Kitchen Weekly Schedule (Week A notebook)

modules.title: Central Kitchen — Prep & Recipes
modules.desc: The Central Kitchen weekly production cadence and the core recipes/methods used to prep for Mad Benji, Hey Sister and Mad Hot Pot.

steps.heading: Weekly Cadence (Week A)
items: Monday: Off
Tuesday (8am CK / 5–9pm MHP prep): bake pumpkins, drain chickpeas, collect dumplings, pumpkin patty mix, pumpkin hummus, pickled onion
Wednesday (9am van run from Bibi's): logistics — pick up beef/stocks/containers across MB, CK, HS, MHP; make pumpkin patty; marinate pull beef
Thursday (9am CK / 4pm Benji): bake pull beef, dough, pork-prawn dumplings, bacon jam, charge chargers
Friday (7.30 CK / 6pm MHP): drain beef + mix bacon jam, deliver to Hampton Park
Standing task: Ranch hand delivery to MB — put it away

steps.heading: Pull Beef
items: Bake pull beef FIRST: 160°C, 20% steam, flip
If still not ready by 3.30pm: set oven 90°C, 20% steam, bake for 5 hours
Drain beef, then mix with all bacon jam evenly

steps.heading: Bacon Jam
items: Dice onion at the bottom, then bacon, then the rest of the condiments in it
Cook till done, then blend with hand-stick
High heat first, then medium-to-low heat to simmer

steps.heading: Pumpkin Patty
items: Bake 30kg pumpkins: 160°C, 10 mins × 4 times
Drain 40 tins chickpeas for patty
Make pumpkin patty mix; press & disc
Marinate

steps.heading: Pumpkin Hummus
items: Drain 13 tins chickpeas (bake a tray of pumpkin too)
Pumpkin hummus × 2 recipe

steps.heading: Pork-Prawn Dumplings
items: Defrost prawns (add cracked pepper & salt)
Pork prawn dumplings — 20kg
Collect dumplings
